title: Untitled Footage
overview: One year after the death of Rachel Montgomery, her sister Tessa seeks answers. Armed with a camera, Tessa and her friend Grant decide it is time to uncover the mystery and try to identify the man responsible for brutal murder and unspeakable evil: The Claw Hammer Killer.
